name: Shimmer Reverb
description: A lush reverb with an octave-up pitch-shifted shimmer effect that builds slowly over time. Produces ethereal, atmospheric textures with up to 10 seconds of reverb time.
author: Audiofab

controls.name: Treble
controls.description: Amount of treble in the reverb loop.

controls.name: Reverb Time
controls.description: Length of the reverb decay (0–10 s).
